creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 186839
Update x11/tint to 15.2

The attached patch updates x11/tint to version 0.15.2. Despite the bug version number jump this release has next to no user visible changes besides some smaller bugfixes. Changes to the port are:

* Bump version number
* Update plist
* Add some missing USES

The changes to the application can be found here: https://gitlab.com/o9000/tint2/blob/master/ChangeLog


The port was tested with Poudriere on FreeBSD 10.3, 11.0 and 11.1. I've run it for several hours on my desktop.
